# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

parameters:
  - name: 'vnetName'
    type: string
    defaultValue: ''
    description: 'The name of the VNet to create.'
  - name: 'location'
    type: string
    defaultValue: '[resourceGroup().location]'
    description: 'The location where the VNet will be created.'
  - name: 'vnetAddressSpace'
    type: array
    defaultValue: [ '10.0.0.0/8', '10.1.0.0/16', '10.2.0.0/16' ]
    description: 'The address space for the VNet.'
  - name: 'subnets'
    type: array
    defaultValue: [ { name: subnet1, prefix: '10.0.1.0/24', enableServiceEndpoint: true }, { name: subnet2, prefix: '10.0.2.0/24', enableServiceEndpoint: true } ]
    description: 'The list of subnets to create.'
  - name: 'allowPublicAccess'
    type: boolean
    defaultValue: true
    description: 'Whether or not to allow public access to the VNet.'

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    name: $[parameters('vnetName')]
    apiVersion: '2019-04-01'
    location: $[parameters('location')]
    properties:
      addressSpace: {
        addressPrefixes: $[parameters('vnetAddressSpace')]
      }
      subnets:
        - name: default
          properties:
            addressPrefix: '10.0.0.0/8'
            serviceEndpoints:
              - service: 'Microsoft.Storage'
              - service: 'Microsoft.Sql'
            enableDnsHosting: true
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: 'Disabled'
            privateLinkServiceNetworkPolicies: 'Disabled'
      virtualNetworkPeerings: []
    dependsOn: []
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    name: storage1
    apiVersion: '2019-06-01'
    location: $[parameters('location')]
    properties:
      enableHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      isHnsEnabled: false
      networkRuleSet:
        defaultAction: Deny
        virtualNetworkRules:
          - virtualNetworkResourceId: '/subscriptions/<subscription-id>/resourceGroups/<resource-group>/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/vnet1'
            action: Allow
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    name: sqlServer1
    apiVersion: '2021-05-01-preview'
    location: $[parameters('location')]
    properties:
      administratorLogin: admin
      administratorLoginPassword: <password>
      version: 12.0
